title: Freeport-McMoRan: A Buy With One Caveat
text: The stock market is quietly optimistic about the Fed's pivot in the November meeting, with a glorious 9.05% S&P 500 recovery in the past two weeks. Nonetheless, 81% of analysts still predict a 75 basis points hike in November, given the surprisingly sticky September labor/ PPI/ CPI reports thus far.

title: Freeport-McMoRan: Why ConocoPhillips CEO Sold Oil And Bought Copper
text: Shares of leading copper producer Freeport-McMoRan were up 10% on Friday's rip-roaring market rally. That's great for COP CEO Ryan Lance, who recently sold 584,900 shares of COP while buying nearly $1 million worth of stock in Freeport-McMoRan.

title: American Copper Industry Veteran Taylor Melvin To Join Ivanhoe Electric As Its President and Chief Executive Officer
text: Will lead the Company as it develops the critical mineral mines necessary for the energy transition in the United States Robert Friedland will continue as Executive Chairman Eric Finlayson will assume new role as Chief of Global Exploration NEW YORK, NY / ACCESSWIRE / October 21, 2022 / Ivanhoe Electric (NYSE American:IE)(TSX:IE) Chairman and current Chief Executive Officer Robert Friedland and current President Eric Finlayson are pleased to announce that Taylor Melvin will join the Company as its President and Chief Executive Officer. Mr. Melvin has over 20 years of experience in the natural resources sector as a senior corporate development professional and investment banker.

title: Freeport-McMoRan reports lower net income in Q3, notes 'challenging cost and supply chain environment'
text: (Kitco News) - Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX), the world's second largest copper miner and senior gold producer, announced today that the company produced 1,056 million pounds of copper in Q3 2022, up 7% compared to Q3 2021 (987 million pounds).

title: Freeport-McMoRan Third-Quarter 2022 Financial and Operating Results Release Available on its Website
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE: FCX) today announced that it has posted its third-quarter 2022 financial and operating results press release on the Investor Relations page of its website at https://investors.fcx.com/investors/news-releases.

title: Freeport-McMoRan Third-Quarter 2022 Financial and Operating Results Release Available on its Website
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE: FCX) today announced that it has posted its third-quarter 2022 financial and operating results press release on the Investor Relations page of its website at https://investors.fcx.com/investors/news-releases. As previously indicated on its website, FCX will host a conference call today with securities analysts at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss quarterly results. The conference call will be webcast on the Internet along with slides. Interested parties may listen to the conference call live and view the slides on the Investor Relations page of FCX’s website at https://investors.fcx.com/investors/presentations. A replay of the webcast will be available through Friday, November 18, 2022. FREEPORT: Foremost in Copper FCX is a leading international mining company with headquarters in Phoenix, Arizona. FCX operates large, long-lived, geographically diverse assets with significant proven and probable reserves of copper, gold and molybdenum. FCX is one of the world’s largest publicly traded copper producers. FCX’s portfolio of assets includes the Grasberg minerals district in Indonesia, one of the world’s largest copper and gold deposits; and significant mining operations in North America and South America, including the large-scale Morenci minerals district in Arizona and the Cerro Verde operation in Peru. By supplying responsibly produced copper, FCX is proud to be a positive contributor to the world well beyond its operational boundaries. Additional information about FCX is available on FCX's website at fcx.com.

title: Freeport-McMoRan For A New Energy Market
text: Freeport-McMoRan has seen its share price suffer due to recession fears. The commodity metal markets tend to be susceptible to macroeconomics. Copper demand is expected to increase substantially, and Freeport-McMoRan has world-class assets with negative net-cash costs.

title: Freeport-McMoRan: Buy The Pullback Aggressively And Ride Through The Coming Recession
text: We encouraged investors in our previous update to consider waiting for a pullback before adding exposure in FCX. Accordingly, FCX has retraced nearly 20% from its August highs. Investors need to ask whether they think the looming global recession could batter copper futures further below their July lows. Investors are reminded that the market is forward-looking.
